items.title: Stock-market bulls need Kevin Warsh on their side to keep winning, says Wall Street veteran Bob Doll
items.description: The “high-risk” bull market in stocks needs Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh on its side, according to Bob Doll, CEO at Crossmark Global Investments.

items.title: Retiring abroad sounds like a dream — what could go wrong? Actually, a lot.
items.description: We hear about the older Americans who bask in apparent paradise far from home — but that’s not the whole story.

items.title: 5 charts showing how ‘dumb money’ is transforming the stock market, as retail traders smash Wall Street records
items.description: Retail trading activity set records in May and June — and the propensity of that cohort to buy the dip has looked pretty smart.

items.title: Trump just disclosed his finances for last year. He made over $2 billion on crypto, stocks, licensing and other deals.
items.description: The president’s new annual filing is nearly four times as lengthy as last year’s disclosure and shows crypto income in the hundreds of millions

items.title: U.S. manufacturers keep on trucking despite a road littered with obstacles
items.description: High U.S. tariffs, war with Iran, a spike in oil prices, rising inflation — no matter. American manufacturers grew in June for the sixth month in a row to mark the longest streak in four years.

items.title: Nvidia is betting on a trillion-dollar robotics boom. Here is the hidden way to trade it.
items.description: CEO Jensen Huang has called humanoid robots a “multitrillion-dollar economic opportunity.”

items.title: 14 value stocks of companies primed for rapid growth through 2028
items.description: Value stocks tend to outperform growth stocks during periods of high inflation. These companies in the Russell 1000 Value Index have high revenue growth estimates for the next two years.

items.title: Millions of Americans can get Medicare to cover GLP-1s for weight loss starting this week. Here’s how much it costs.
items.description: Until this week, Medicare only covered GLP-1 drugs for conditions like Type 2 diabetes, sleep apnea, and stroke or heart-attack risk.

items.title: Trump’s energy secretary says global warming is ‘no big deal.’ Meanwhile, a heat emergency is striking the U.S.
items.description: Government scientists warn people to stay indoors this weekend as temperatures in many areas could reach triple digits

items.title: CoreWeave, Nebius shares tumble as Meta stands to become a fresh threat in the cloud
items.description: Meta’s reported interest in monetizing its AI infrastructure is leading investors to question the sustainability of neocloud business models.
